description_long: This object is a small seaplane with a high-wing monoplane design, featuring a white and red color scheme. The fuselage is predominantly white with a red tail and red floats, and the words 'SYDNEY SEAPLANES' are visible on the side. The aircraft is equipped with two large pontoons for water landings, each with a red underside and white topside. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the cockpit windows are tinted dark. The tail section includes a vertical stabilizer with a logo and a horizontal stabilizer, both in red.
description: A white and red seaplane with large pontoons, a high wing, and visible 'SYDNEY SEAPLANES' branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the seaplane, the red and white pontoons, and the 'SYDNEY SEAPLANES' text.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the nose, propeller, cockpit windows, and the twin pontoons beneath the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, but the logo on the tail is more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail structure, red vertical stabilizer, and the alignment of the pontoons.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular red and white logo is visible on the vertical stabilizer (tail fin) of the aircraft.
attribute_handlebar_design: Not applicable; the object has a standard aircraft yoke or control column, not visible in the images.
attribute_seat_configuration: The cockpit appears to have two main seating positions side by side, with additional passenger seating likely behind, but only the cockpit area is clearly visible.
